# Copilot Agent Instructions

Welcome to the **ripem** repository.

Before writing any code, answering any question, or making any decision, you **must** read the knowledge base (the "brain") located at [`/brain`](../brain/).

## Where to Start

1. Read [`/brain/00-start-here/overview.md`](../brain/00-start-here/overview.md) for a high-level orientation.
2. Read [`/brain/00-start-here/how-to-use-this-brain.md`](../brain/00-start-here/how-to-use-this-brain.md) to understand how information is organised.
3. Consult [`/brain/09-agents/agent-instructions.md`](../brain/09-agents/agent-instructions.md) for rules that apply specifically to automated agents.
4. Check [`/brain/09-agents/coding-rules.md`](../brain/09-agents/coding-rules.md) before writing any code.

## Key Sections

| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `/brain/00-start-here` | Orientation & glossary |
| `/brain/01-product` | Product vision, goals, and personas |
| `/brain/02-domains` | Domain-specific business rules and data models |
| `/brain/03-architecture` | System architecture and API contracts |
| `/brain/04-platforms` | iOS and web platform guides |
| `/brain/05-components` | Shared and platform-specific component docs |
| `/brain/06-decisions` | Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) |
| `/brain/07-work` | Roadmap, milestones, and task backlogs |
| `/brain/08-operations` | Developer workflow, branching, testing, and release |
| `/brain/09-agents` | Agent-specific rules and prompts |
| `/brain/10-reference` | Dependencies, conventions, and file map |
| `/brain/11-ingestion` | Raw notes, meeting notes, and scratch space |
| `/brain/12-data` | Structured JSON data for systems, domains, and components |

> **Rule:** Never make assumptions about the product, architecture, or conventions. Always look them up in the brain first.
